productMaturity: mature product external proof intake registry
requirements: every accepted entry must identify the public repo, deployment, or publication URL
every accepted entry must declare which product claims it validates using ids from docs/EXTERNAL_PROOF_CLAIMS.json
marketing claims must not cite pending or unverified entries
repo-local examples do not count as external proof entries
rule: an empty registry is acceptable; external proof is closed only when this registry contains validated public entries
